name: Textarea
description: Multi-line text field with optional character counter, clear button, send action, used-percent indicator, and hint/error feedback. Extends HTML textarea attributes (except children).

props.name: error
props.description: Error message — puts the field in error state.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Maximum character count. Shows counter in bottom bar when set.

props.name: showCount
props.description: Show character counter even without maxLength (displays current count).

props.name: showUsedPercent
props.description: Show 'N% used' indicator in the bottom bar (requires maxLength).

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear (X) button when the textarea has value.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Callback when the clear button is clicked.

props.name: onSend
props.description: Callback for the send action. When provided, a send button renders in the bottom bar.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element. Layout composition only — do NOT use for custom styling.

states.rationale: Textarea box hover changes border color only — no background OKLCH shift or overlay. The embedded send button uses OKLCH L-shift for its hover state, but that is a sub-element action, not the main component surface.

keyboard.Tab: Move focus to/from the textarea and embedded buttons
keyboard.Escape: No default — consumer may wire to blur or cancel

propertyMapping.note: Visual-only Figma property. In code, states come from CSS pseudo-classes (:hover, :focus-within) and data attributes (data-error, data-disabled).
Figma 'text' maps to the HTML textarea 'value' attribute passed through TextareaProps.
Figma 'error' is a boolean toggling the error row. In code, 'error' is a string — truthy string = error state + message.
Figma 'errorText' content maps to the React 'error' string prop value.
Figma boolean toggles entire bottom bar. In code, bottom bar visibility is derived: shows when showCount, maxLength, showUsedPercent, or onSend is set.
Figma 'characters' toggles counter. In code, counter shows when showCount=true or maxLength is set.
Figma boolean toggles send button. In code, send button renders when onSend callback is provided.
Figma boolean toggles '% used' text. Maps to React showUsedPercent prop (also requires maxLength).

useWhen: Multi-line text entry with character counting or limits
Comment or message composition with send action
Description or bio fields needing usage feedback
doNotUseFor: Rich text editing — use a rich text editor

knownDeviations.description: Figma 'text-area' component does not include label or hint rows. In code, Textarea renders label, box, and hint/error as a single component. Label and hint are code-only props with no Figma property counterpart.
